item.description:
## Recappi Mini v1.0.113

### Fixed
- Restored the speaker rename entry in Cloud Transcription.
- Clicking a speaker name now opens the rename popover anchored to the exact speaker row that was clicked.
- Speaker renames continue to apply to all matching segments in the current recording.

### Validation
- `swift test`: 254 tests passed, 1 skipped.
- `./scripts/build-app.sh` completed successfully.
- Targeted Cloud UI tests passed for speaker rename and transcript segment clicking.
